keyEvents.text: Goal!  Saint Lucia 1, Sint Maarten 0. Terell Thomas (Saint Lucia) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Alvinus Myers   following a corner.
Goal!  Saint Lucia 1, Sint Maarten 1. Chovanie Amatkarijo (Sint Maarten) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Imar Kort.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Jevick MacFarlane replaces Alvinus Myers because of an injury.
Second Half begins Saint Lucia 1, Sint Maarten 1.
Goal!  Saint Lucia 1, Sint Maarten 2. Gerwin Lake (Sint Maarten) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Quintón Christina.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Ronan Olivacce replaces Diaro Forsythe.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Canius Sandiford replaces Jason Similien.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Shervon Malik St. Prix replaces Ridel Stanislas.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Elmer de Vries replaces Gerwin Lake.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. Oliver Hobgood replaces Kay Gerritsen.
Kurt Frederick (Saint Lucia) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Brandon Sandiford replaces Andrus Remy.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Eymani Butcher replaces Gregson President.
Substitution, Sint Maarten. T-Shawn Illidge replaces Chovanie Amatkarijo.
